name: last30days-cn
description: Chinese-platform last-30-days research skill covering Weibo, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, Zhihu, Douyin, WeChat, Baidu, and Toutiao. Includes compact Markdown, full Markdown, JSON, and Guizang-inspired Swiss/IKB HTML report output.

settings.name: ScrapeCreators API Key
settings.description: Optional API key kept for compatibility with existing configuration.

settings.name: Zhihu Cookie
settings.description: Optional Zhihu login cookie for higher-quality search.

settings.name: TikHub API Key
settings.description: Optional TikHub key for Douyin search.

settings.name: WeChat API Key
settings.description: Optional WeChat public-account search API key.

settings.name: Baidu Secret Key
settings.description: Optional Baidu secret key paired with BAIDU_API_KEY.
